description: Vendr provides software pricing data, price-estimate tooling, quote analysis, and negotiation guidance for software purchasing. Its marketplace and APIs help customers compare software costs and integrate Vendr’s pricing insights into applications and AI agents.
summary: vendr.com exposes a Vendr Public HTTP API at `https://api.vendr.com` and an MCP server at `https://mcp.vendr.com/mcp`; both require a Vendr-issued access key, and webhook deliveries are signed with an auto-generated webhook secret returned when you create a webhook.
